name: network_reachability
desc: Network Reachability

name: CaptivePortalStatus
desc: The result of a captive portal detection probe.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isCaptivePortal
desc: True if the engine detected that HTTP requests are being redirected.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: redirectUrl
desc: The destination URL where the traffic was intercepted.

name: CaptivePortalStatusCopyWith
desc: Extension on CaptivePortalStatus for status immutability.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a modified status of the captive portal probe.

name: CheckStrategy
desc: Defines the strategy used when evaluating multiple network targets during a check cycle.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: CircuitBreakerOpenException
desc: Exception thrown when the Circuit Breaker is active.

name: CircuitBreakerOpenException.new
desc: Creates a new CircuitBreakerOpenException with the given message and retryAfter.

name: retryAfter
desc: The suggested duration to wait before trying again.

name: CircuitBreakerState
desc: Represents the operational state of the Circuit Breaker pattern.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ConnectionQuality
desc: Represents the perceived quality of the network connection based on latency, jitter, and stability.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: ConnectionType
desc: Represents the physical or logical medium of the active network connection.

name: default_
desc: Returns `ConnectionType::Unknown` as the default state.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: LatencyStats
desc: A suite of statistical metrics derived from multiple latency samples.

name: avgLatencyMs
desc: The arithmetic mean of all successful latency samples.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: jitterMs
desc: The "Jitter" value in milliseconds.

name: latencyMs
desc:
The representative latency value (usually the mean of all successful samples).
Measured in milliseconds.

name: maxLatencyMs
desc:
The highest latency recorded across all samples in the cycle.
Often indicates transient congestion or "spikes".

name: minLatencyMs
desc:
The lowest latency recorded across all samples in the cycle.
Represents the "best-case" performance of the current link.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: packetLossPercent
desc: The percentage of samples (0.0 to 100.0) that failed to return a response.

name: stabilityScore
desc: A composite score from 0 (broken) to 100 (perfect) representing overall stability.

name: LatencyStatsCopyWith
desc: Extension on LatencyStats for granular metric management.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of stats with updated metrics.

name: NetworkConfiguration
desc: The master configuration for the Network Reachability Engine.

name: cacheValidityMs
desc: Cache duration (ms) for results.

name: checkIntervalMs
desc: Frequency (ms) of background checks.

name: default_
desc: Standard production-ready configuration.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: newInstance
desc: Constructs a full `NetworkConfiguration`.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: qualityThreshold
desc: Thresholds for quality categorization.

name: resilience
desc: Performance and resilience settings.

name: security
desc: Security policy settings.

name: targets
desc:
The list of endpoints (NetworkTarget models)
to probe.

name: NetworkConfigurationCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkConfiguration to enable easy immutability.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy of the current configuration with updated fields.

name: NetworkReachability
desc: The central entry point for the Network Reachability library.

name: check
desc: Performs a comprehensive network check.

name: checkForCaptivePortal
desc: Detects if the current network is a "Captive Portal" (e.g., public WiFi login page).

name: checkTarget
desc: Performs a targeted reachability probe against a single endpoint.

name: detectDnsHijacking
desc: Checks for potential DNS tampering by comparing system results against trusted resolvers.

name: detectSecurityAndNetworkType
desc: Inspects active network interfaces to determine connectivity type and security status.

name: didChangeAppLifecycleState
desc: Observes Flutter's app lifecycle to manage battery consumption.

name: dispose
desc: Releases resources, removes observers, and shuts down the service.

name: guard
desc: Protects a network-sensitive action by validating the connection first.

name: init
desc: Initializes the Network Reachability engine.

name: instance
desc: Access the singleton instance of the network reachability service.

name: onStatusChange
desc: A stream that emits NetworkStatus updates whenever a periodic check completes.

name: NetworkReachabilityException
desc: Base class for all exceptions thrown by the Network Reachability library.

name: NetworkReachabilityException.new
desc: Creates a new NetworkReachabilityException with the given message.

name: message
desc: A human-readable description of the error.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: NetworkReportCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkReport (Opaque pointer) to allow mutation.

name: copyWith
desc: Mutates the underlying report object.

name: NetworkStatus
desc: A high-level summary of the network's current state.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isConnected
desc: True if the network is functionally "up" based on the configured strategy.

name: latencyStats
desc: Detailed statistical breakdown for performance analysis.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: quality
desc: The categorical quality of the connection (e.g., Excellent, Poor, Offline).

name: winnerTarget
desc: The label of the specific target that responded the fastest in this check.

name: NetworkStatusCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkStatus for summary updates.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of the high-level status with modified values.

name: NetworkTarget
desc: Configuration for a specific network endpoint to be monitored.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: host
desc: The remote address to check.

name: isEssential
desc: If true, a failure of this target is treated as a severe network event.

name: label
desc:
A human-readable identifier (e.g., "Google Cloud DNS", "Internal API").
This label is used in TargetReport results.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: port
desc: The destination port for the check.

name: priority
desc: The relative priority of this target (lower numbers = higher priority).

name: protocol
desc: The network protocol to use for this specific probe.

name: timeoutMs
desc: The maximum duration (in milliseconds) the engine should wait for a response.

name: NetworkTargetCopyWith
desc: Extension on NetworkTarget to modify probe endpoint definitions.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of the target configuration.

name: NetworkTimeoutException
desc: Exception thrown when a network probe or check exceeds its allocated time.

name: NetworkTimeoutException.new
desc: Creates a new NetworkTimeoutException with the given message.

name: PoorConnectionException
desc: Exception thrown when the network quality is too low for a requested operation.

name: PoorConnectionException.new
desc: Creates a new PoorConnectionException with the given message.

name: QualityThresholds
desc: Defines the latency thresholds (in milliseconds) used to categorize `ConnectionQuality`.

name: default_
desc: Provides industry-standard default latency thresholds for most applications.

name: excellent
desc:
Maximum latency (ms) to be considered `ConnectionQuality::Excellent`.
Default: 50ms

name: good
desc:
Maximum latency (ms) to be considered `ConnectionQuality::Good`.
Default: 150ms

name: great
desc:
Maximum latency (ms) to be considered `ConnectionQuality::Great`.
Default: 100ms

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: moderate
desc:
Maximum latency (ms) to be considered `ConnectionQuality::Moderate`.
Default: 250ms

name: newInstance
desc: Creates a new custom `QualityThresholds` instance.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: poor
desc:
Maximum latency (ms) to be considered `ConnectionQuality::Poor`.
Anything above this is typically marked as `ConnectionQuality::Poor` or
`ConnectionQuality::Unstable`.
Default: 500ms

name: QualityThresholdsCopyWith
desc: Extension on QualityThresholds for easy updates to latency categorization.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a new QualityThresholds with overridden values.

name: ResilienceConfig
desc: Configuration for network resilience, failure handling, and statistical analysis.

name: circuitBreakerCooldownMs
desc: Duration (ms) the engine waits before attempting a "Half-Open" probe.

name: circuitBreakerThreshold
desc: Number of consecutive failures before the "Circuit Breaker" opens.

name: criticalPacketLossPrecent
desc: Critical packet loss percentage (0.0 - 100.0).

name: default_
desc: Balanced default resilience configuration.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: jitterThresholdPercent
desc: Percentage threshold for jitter classification.

name: newInstance
desc: Creates a new custom `ResilienceConfig`.

name: numJitterSamples
desc: Number of packets/samples to send per target for statistical analysis.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: stabilityThershold
desc: Minimum stability score (0-100) required for a 'Stable' rating.

name: strategy
desc: The evaluation strategy (Race vs Consensus) for multi-target checks.

name: ResilienceConfigCopyWith
desc: Extension on ResilienceConfig to tune circuit breaker and stability scoring.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy with modified resilience parameters.

name: RustLib
desc: Main entrypoint of the Rust API

name: apiImplConstructor
desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: codegenVersion
desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: defaultExternalLibraryLoaderConfig
desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: dispose
desc: Dispose flutter_rust_bridge

name: executeRustInitializers
desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: init
desc: Initialize flutter_rust_bridge

name: initMock
desc:
Initialize flutter_rust_bridge in mock mode.
No libraries for FFI are loaded.

desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: wireConstructor
desc:
This is only intended to be used by automatically generated code,
instead of developers.

name: SecurityAlert
desc: Identifies specific security violations or network policy alerts.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: SecurityConfig
desc: Configuration for security-related network checks and policy enforcement.

name: blockVpn
desc: If enabled, the engine will flag connections that originate from a VPN interface.

name: detectDnsHijack
desc: If enabled, performs deep DNS validation to detect hijacking.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: SecurityConfigCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityConfig for toggling network security probes.

name: copyWith
desc: Creates a copy with updated security settings.

name: SecurityException
desc: Exception thrown when a security policy is violated.

name: SecurityException.new
desc: Creates a new SecurityException with the given reason and message.

name: reason
desc: The specific security reason why this exception was thrown.

name: SecurityFlags
desc: Internal representation of security-related attributes for the current connection.

name: default_
desc: Returns a "Safe/Clean" default state where no security issues are detected.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: interfaceName
desc:
The system-assigned name of the active network interface.
Examples: wlan0 (Linux WiFi), en0 (macOS WiFi), eth0 (Ethernet).

name: isDnsSpoofed
desc: True if the system DNS appears to be providing malicious or redirected results.

name: isProxyDetected
desc: True if a system-wide HTTP or SOCKS proxy is active.

name: isVpnDetected
desc: True if the active network interface is identified as a tunnel/VPN.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: SecurityFlagsCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityFlags for interface security metadata.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of SecurityFlags with updated values.

name: default_
desc: Returns a "Safe/Clean" default state where no security issues are detected.

name: SecurityFlagsResultCopyWith
desc: Extension on SecurityFlagsResult (Opaque pointer) to allow mutation.

name: copyWith
desc: Mutates the opaque result object with new flag values.

name: TargetProtocol
desc: Supported network protocols for performing reachability probes.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: TargetReport
desc: Detailed outcome of a connectivity check against a specific target.

name: error
desc: A descriptive error message provided by the engine if the check failed.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isEssential
desc: Indicates if this target is critical for the overall "Connected" status.

name: label
desc: The unique label identifying the target (e.g., "Primary API Gateway").

name: latencyMs
desc: The measured latency in milliseconds for the fastest successful sample.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: success
desc: Indicates whether the target was successfully reached using the specified protocol.

name: TargetReportCopyWith
desc: Extension on TargetReport for single target metrics.

name: copyWith
desc: Returns a copy of the report for a specific target.
